query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.sector, p.projectState, p.stageCode,
  p.value, p.productLane,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS srCount,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.name END) AS topContact,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.title END) AS topTitle,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.company END) AS topCompany,
  DATE(p.createdAt) AS addedDate
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps'))
  AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.projectState = 'NATIONAL' OR p.projectState IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING srCount >= 1
ORDER BY 
  CASE p.priority WHEN 'hot' THEN 1 WHEN 'warm' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  srCount DESC,
  p.value DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT 
  p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.sector, p.projectState, p.stageCode,
  p.value, p.productLane,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS srCount,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.name END) AS topContact,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.title END) AS topTitle,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.company END) AS topCompany,
  DATE(p.createdAt) AS addedDate
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps'))
  AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.projectState = 'NATIONAL' OR p.projectState IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING srCount >= 1
ORDER BY 
  CASE p.priority WHEN 'hot' THEN 1 WHEN 'warm' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  srCount DESC,
  p.value DESC
LIMIT 10;
